aimFixedVariables.description: Grid Emission Factor for Mauritius (MU) reference implementation. Source: Mauritius national grid emission factor. At production this value is read per-licensee from the LICENSE_GRANT HCS record.
Installed generation capacity of the reference run-of-river hydropower station in megawatts. Used to derive physicsLimitKwh. At production this value is read from the GATEWAY_DEPLOY HCS record.

Maximum permissible kWh per single sensor reading for the reference implementation. Derived from capacityMW (1.0 MW) * 1000. Any TELEMETRY record with kwh > 200 is rejected by the edge notary before HCS submission. This is a mandatory fraud-prevention gate.
